calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Graham Struthers
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JUSTIN DAILY, ESQ. of Daily Ajian LLP, Tel No. 949-861-2524 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
Atty. ASHLEY N. MEYERS, ESQ. of Clapp Moroney Vucinich Beeman Scheley APLC, Tel No. 925-734-0990 appearing for the Defendant Fairmont Hotel Management LP.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear at hearing. Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff Graham Struther's Motion (1) To Compel Further Responses from Defendant Fairmont Hotel Management, L.P. to Plaintiff's Request for Production of Documents (Set One); (2) To Compel Further Responses from Defendant Fairmont Hotel Management, L.P. to Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories (Set One); and (3) For Sanctions Against Defendant Fairmont Hotel Management, L.P. and Its Counsel is granted as modified by discussions at hearing. Plaintiff's counsel shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature reflecting the modifications discussed at hearing and in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2015 Continued To Jul-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
